# Mohammed Mubashir Ali

> Portfolio of Mohammed Mubashir Ali — Software Engineer, AI/ML Enthusiast, and Full-Stack Developer based in Hyderabad, India.

This site showcases projects, skills, education, and achievements across AI/ML, full-stack web development, and DSA. Visitors can review featured work, download a resume, and get in touch via the contact form.

## Pages

- [Home](/): About, skills, projects, education, achievements, and contact.
